sections.label: Lyrics
lines: A trembling hand upon the frame,
The night is thick, the air is flame.
They gather whispers in the street,
But I am stronger on my knees.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Even as the silence tightens,
even as the shadows grow,
Still my heart is lifted skyward,
Still my spirit overflows.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Open wide the window, let the wild winds in,
I will not be hidden, I will not give in.
Though the world may threaten, though the darkness tries to reign,
I will sing forever, I will glorify His name.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Iron words cannot contain,
What the soul of light proclaims.
Every wall becomes a door,
Every chain is ash and more.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: The night may howl with bitter breath,
The ground may shake with threats of death.
But love is louder than the grave,
A fearless song no storm can take.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Lift the veil, reveal the dawn,
My song is endless, it carries on.
The lions roar, but I remain,
Held by love that cannot change.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Open wide the window, let the wild winds see,
Faith is fire eternal, burning endlessly.
Though the storm surrounds me, though the shadows take their aim,
Still my voice is rising, I will glorify His name.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Open wide the window…
Let the wild winds in…
Forever unashamed,
Forever unafraid.
